personalInfo.name: Mohamed Refky
personalInfo.title: Flutter Developer | Mobile App Engineer
personalInfo.description: I build scalable mobile applications using Flutter, Clean Architecture, and AI integrations.
personalInfo.about: Computer Science graduate and Flutter Developer with hands-on experience building scalable mobile applications. Passionate about sharing knowledge as a Coding Instructor and continuously growing through professional projects.

services.title: Mobile App Development
services.description: Building high-performance, cross-platform apps with Flutter, focusing on scalability and user experience.

services.title: AI & API Integration
services.description: Integrating LLMs (Gemini), REST APIs, and Firebase to create smart, data-driven applications.

services.title: Coding Instruction
services.description: Simplifying complex programming concepts for students, focusing on logic building and problem-solving.

services.title: Architecture Design
services.description: Implementing Clean Architecture and SOLID principles to ensure maintainable and testable codebases.

experience.title: Coding Instructor & Mentor
experience.description: Selected for the position after successfully passing the rigorous DEMI evaluation phase to instruct students in programming fundamentals.

experience.title: Flutter Developer (Freelance)
experience.description: Developed and delivered scalable, cross-platform mobile solutions including the Eduon LMS platform.

projects.title: Eduon LMS
projects.description: A comprehensive learning platform featuring YouTube API integration, structured roadmaps, and a community hub for tech organizations.

projects.title: Diety App
projects.description: AI-powered fitness assistant using Gemini AI and Machine Learning (Decision Tree) to provide personalized diet plans.
